2606.07489.title: How AI Agents Reshape Knowledge Work: Autonomy, Efficiency, and Scope
2606.07489.paper_summary: Frontier AI systems are bridging the gap between intelligence and utility by shifting from conversational assistants to autonomous agents that execute tasks end to end. Using production data from Perplexity's Search and Computer products, we study this transition by examining how AI agents accelerate and reshape knowledge work. Three key empirical findings emerge. First, using sessions with near-identical initial query pairs as natural experiments for the same underlying task attempted with both products, Computer performs 26 minutes of autonomous work per user session, versus 33 seconds for Search. Computer automates task decomposition and execution that Search users might otherwise manually orchestrate and implement. As a result, Computer shifts follow-up query distribution toward higher-order work such as verification and extension. Autonomy also increases execution quality, with per-query dissatisfaction rates 55% lower on Computer than on Search. Second, due to its autonomy advantage, Computer reduces completion time from 269 to 36 minutes on matched tasks, lowering estimated time and cost by 87% and 94%, respectively, compared to humans equipped with Search alone. Third, Computer changes the scope of work that users attempt: Computer queries more often cross occupational boundaries, require higher-order cognition, draw on broader expertise, take the form of composite tasks that bundle interdependent subtasks into a single query, and unlock work activities that are essentially absent from Search usage among the same users. Together, the evidence indicates that AI agents accelerate workflows, enhance output quality, reduce costs, and expand the breadth and depth of automated work.
2606.07489.paper_summary_zh: 前沿的 AI 系統正在縮短智慧與實用之間的差距，通過從對話助手轉變為執行端到端任務的自主代理。利用 Perplexity 的搜尋和計算產品的生產數據，我們通過檢視 AI 代理如何加速和重塑知識工作來研究這一過渡。三個關鍵的實證發現浮現出來。首先，使用幾乎相同的初始查詢對作為自然實驗來測試兩個產品下的相同基本任務，計算機每個用戶會話執行 26 分鐘的自主工作，而搜尋則為 33 秒。計算機自動化任務分解和執行，而搜尋用戶可能會手動協調和實施這些任務。因此，計算機將後續查詢的分佈轉向更高層次的工作，如驗證和擴展。自主性還提高了執行質量，計算機的每查詢不滿意率比搜尋低 55%。其次，由於其自主性優勢，計算機將匹配任務的完成時間從 269 分鐘縮短至 36 分鐘，與僅使用搜尋的人類相比，估計時間和成本分別降低了 87% 和 94%。第三，計算機改變了用戶嘗試的工作範疇：計算機查詢更頻繁地跨越職業邊界，需要更高層次的認知，依賴更廣泛的專業知識，採取將相互依賴的子任務捆綁成單一查詢的複合任務形式，並解鎖在相同用戶的搜尋使用中基本不存在的工作活動。綜合來看，證據表明 AI 代理加速工作流程，提升產出質量，降低成本，並擴展自動化工作的廣度和深度。
2606.07489.author: Jeremy Yang et.al.
2606.07489.authors: Jeremy Yang, Kate Zyskowski, Noah Yonack, Jerry Ma
